title: lefebvrea camerunensis
intro: Lefebvrea camerunensis, also known as African tea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, particularly in Cameroon and other countries in the region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lefebvrea camerunensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea or infusion to reap its medicinal benefits.
